scope: Xlooop-XCP-demo current Operations UI; MB-P metadata-only feedback; no protected repo mutation.
operator_path: Review the Current owner action -> lifecycle -> evidence/sign-off -> Learning / XCP feedback ribbon
Review Runtime export headroom guard under Diagnostics / run evidence
Review Morning report and Visual verification addendum

visible_changes.label: Operations cockpit path
visible_changes.surface: Do now / Workflow / Evidence and telemetry ribbon
visible_changes.owner_value: Shows the hierarchy before the dense Operations cards.

visible_changes.label: Messy intake readiness
visible_changes.surface: MB-P benchmark feedback with owner review action
visible_changes.owner_value: Turns MB-P intake benchmark gaps into a Xlooop-local review packet without raw MB-P payload or writeback.

visible_changes.label: Bundle headroom guard
visible_changes.surface: App bundle headroom verifier and journey-priority gate
visible_changes.owner_value: Restores app bundle headroom for more visible product work and prevents future hidden UI-bloat loops.

visible_changes.label: First-30-second hierarchy
visible_changes.surface: Current owner action -> lifecycle -> evidence/sign-off -> Learning / XCP feedback
visible_changes.owner_value: Makes the commercial workflow understandable before diagnostics, CI evidence, and runtime budget details.

visible_changes.label: Guided owner review
visible_changes.owner_value: Reduces below-first-viewport card load by showing owner confirmation, evidence, sign-off, and Learning / XCP feedback as one packet review sequence.

visible_changes.label: MB-P projection packet adoption
visible_changes.owner_value: Turns a safe MB-P projected packet into a Xlooop-local owner review packet without MB-P writeback or raw private payload.

visible_changes.label: Projection guided handoff
visible_changes.owner_value: Keeps the adopted MB-P projection packet in the same confirm, prove, sign, learn chain so it is visible and actionable after queue adoption.

visible_changes.label: Owner queue continuity
visible_changes.owner_value: Removes adopted projection packets from the source action queue and shows one owner-visible continuation path with queues as supporting context.

visible_changes.label: First-viewport continuity
visible_changes.owner_value: Moves owner continuation guidance above the primary and workflow lanes so it is visible before lower queue details.

visible_changes.label: Operations free-text intake handoff
visible_changes.surface: Owner intake handoff above primary action lane
visible_changes.owner_value: Lets the owner type a real MB-P/Xlooop operational request and create a Xlooop-local governance packet without backend persistence or MB-P writeback.

visible_changes.label: Free-text packet guided continuity
visible_changes.owner_value: Shows that a newly typed owner request continues immediately through confirmation, evidence, sign-off, and Learning / XCP feedback.

visible_changes.label: Recent packet review history
visible_changes.owner_value: Keeps owner-created packets recoverable after creation and confirmation without forcing the owner into source queues or telemetry.

visible_changes.label: History evidence/sign-off handoff
visible_changes.owner_value: Moves an owner-created packet from evidence readiness to sign-off to Learning / XCP feedback from the same compact history row.

visible_changes.label: History density and keyboard clarity
visible_changes.owner_value: Keeps the operational packet history row compact, readable, and keyboard-operable as it moves through confirmation, evidence, sign-off, and Learning / XCP feedback.

visible_changes.label: Owner visual walkthrough continuation
visible_changes.owner_value: Keeps the next owner-confirmation action visible immediately after packet creation instead of requiring the owner to scroll into lower history.

visible_changes.label: Visible evidence/sign-off continuation
visible_changes.owner_value: After owner confirmation, the same visible continuation lane advances to evidence readiness, sign-off, and Learning / XCP feedback without lower-queue hunting.

visible_changes.label: Visible completion copy
visible_changes.owner_value: The same visible lane now names each state: created, owner review confirmed, evidence ready, sign-off complete, and Learning / XCP feedback next.

visible_changes.label: Completion lifecycle screenshots
visible_changes.owner_value: Morning review now has four committed screenshots covering created, confirmed, evidence-ready, and signed/Learning-ready packet states.

visible_changes.label: Readiness decision review
visible_changes.owner_value: Names that the packet lane is ready for persistence/collaboration boundary planning, while backend persistence, MB-P writeback, and invited-collaborator flows remain unimplemented.

visible_changes.label: Persistence and collaboration boundary
visible_changes.owner_value: Defines allowed persisted fields, forbidden private fields, invited-collaborator limits, and blocked MB-P/x-front/x-docs/XCP event actions before backend work.

visible_changes.label: Boundary visibility in Operations
visible_changes.surface: Operations persistence and collaboration boundary panel
visible_changes.owner_value: Makes safe persisted metadata, forbidden private fields, blocked MB-P writeback, and disabled collaborator/public-link states visible before backend implementation.

visible_changes.label: Persistence action guard
visible_changes.surface: Operations persistence and collaboration boundary panel
visible_changes.owner_value: Lets the owner create a local planning packet for persistence/collaboration while backend persistence, MB-P writeback, private payloads, invited collaborators, and public links remain blocked.

visible_changes.label: Commercial proof loop and mobile shell
visible_changes.owner_value: Makes the live MB-P integrated demo narratable as intent capture, governed context, decision ledger, evidence, sign-off, and learning while keeping the mobile main surface visible.

next_recommended_slice.title: Continue the planning packet through owner confirmation and evidence readiness
next_recommended_slice.reason: C107 creates only a local planning packet. The next slice should prove the packet can move through owner confirmation and readiness without enabling backend persistence, public links, invited collaborators, private payload storage, or MB-P writeback.

owner_handoff.title: Owner review current visual verification addendum
acceptance_criteria: Owner can see where the latest overnight work landed.
Owner can create a Xlooop-local review packet from the addendum.
Owner can confirm the handoff into a work item without MB-P writeback.
